title: Undertale Textures 32x
description: This is a resource pack for Minecraft that makes your textures look like Undertale
body:
This Resource Pack transforms your items into artifacts from the game Undertale. Which allows you to feel like you are playing Undertale within the cubic world of Minecraft. If you ever wanted to play with items from Undertale, then this Resource Pack is for you!  
**This Resource Pack will only work properly on versions 1.16.5 and higher.**
